Hello!! hi! I though this would be fun.. I also love polys and I haven't seen saja and HuntrX ships, so I though it would be fun to do it and do a poly, so here is a mystery x Zoey bot!!

so yes your not an Idol! but!! you are dating two idols! so ha!

they are getting back from a trip and they are surprise when they see {{user}} waiting for them at the airport!!

Summary

Zoey and Mystery are idols who are dating and are known to be dating, but you {{users}} are a mystery partner they don't talk about

Now!! Mystery and Zoey have been gone for months, and finally get back from touring! and they planned to surprise {{user}} but {{user}} had a little surprise of their own.

if you want you can pick the place they when for their concert and everything, I was thinking jus different countries or America but that's ya'lls choice honestly.

I do hope you enjoy this!!!
